May 23, 2025

## This company’s products are wonderful; their customer support is abysmal.

This company’s products are wonderful; their customer support is abysmal. These products have probiotics and should be refrigerated to preserve their potency. I typically would purchase in store to maintain refrigeration. I began ordering from Health-Ade direct about 8 months ago and had concerns about my product being unrefrigerated while shipping. On my first order I purchased a case and was delighted to see they shipped locally and so my order would reach me in a day or two. The product would usually arrive still slightly chilly which was fantastic. I deliberately placed my orders on Sunday or Monday so they would ship and be received before the weekend. All was well and I ordered roughly two cases monthly.My most recent order a few days ago, I ordered two cases of product. One shipped locally and was received two days later, the other shipped from the other side of the United States, literally. I contacted Health-Ade support and expressed concern about my

## For those who struggle with extra weight

Recently I decided for myself that I would try to struggle with my extra weight. I bought a season ticket to the nearest gym and started to attend it. Everything was okay but my personal coach told me to buy some vitamins and supplements in order to restore the lack of them in my organism after trainings. I applied to this company mainly because I found here vitamins which I needed, moreover I bought couple o pack of BCAA, as my coach told me doing it. Everything was okay, all the nutrition and vitamins were delivered within several days and I guess I will apply here once soon.

## We use technology to protect platform integrity, but we don't fact-check reviews

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. Read more

## Review summary

Based on reviews, created with AI

Most reviewers were somewhat happy with their experience overall. Many customers are satisfied with the staff, describing them as kind, knowledgeable, and supportive. People also report positive outcomes regarding their fitness, including weight loss, increased energy, improved sleep, and reduced pain and inflammation. The program's resources, recipes, and one-on-one counseling are frequently praised. However, some people were dissatisfied with the high cost of the programs and services, feeling they did not receive value commensurate with the price. There are also mixed opinions regarding the product and service, with some customers finding the information generic or the sales tactics pushy. A few other people also felt that the initial consultations were primarily sales pitches for expensive programs rather than informative sessions.See more

### Written by the company

HopeCBD is a pioneering wellness company dedicated to harnessing the natural benefits of cannabidiol (CBD) to promote holistic health and well-being. Founded on the principles of transparency, quality, and innovation, HopeCBD strives to make CBD accessible to everyone seeking a natural solution for their wellness needs. At HopeCBD, we prioritize quality above all else. Our CBD products are crafted using organically grown hemp sourced from trusted farms known for their commitment to sustainable practices and purity. Through rigorous testing and meticulous extraction processes, we ensure that every product maintains the highest standards of potency, purity, and consistency. We believe in the power of education to empower individuals to make informed choices about their health. That's why we're committed to providing comprehensive resources and personalized guidance to our customers, helping them navigate the world of CBD with confidence and clarity. Our product line spans a diverse range of CBD solutions, including oils, capsules, topicals, edibles, and more
